type_system_strategy.label: Type System Strategy
options: Schema-driven (JSON Schema / Protobuf as source of truth)

data_access_pattern.label: Data Access / ORM Strategy
options: Query builder (Knex, Diesel, JOOQ, SQLAlchemy Core)

authentication.label: Authentication Method
options: IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts - AWS)

session_strategy.label: Session / State Strategy
options: Change Data Capture (CDC) for state sync
URL as state (everything in query params)

metrics.label: Metrics Strategy
options: Manually checking production logs (the original APM)

testing_approach.label: Testing Approach
options: No testing (ship it and see what breaks)
No testing (the users are the QA team)

docs_approach.label: Documentation Approach
options: Codespaces / Gitpod dev environments as docs

security_model.label: Security Model / Posture
options: Encryption at rest (transparent data encryption - TDE)
No security (move fast and break things)

iac_tool.label: IaC Tool
options: Post-it notes on the server rack
